core_mechanism: two-point angular correlation and spherical-harmonic (multipole) power-spectrum analysis of a point pattern on a sphere, testing it against the null of a uniform isotropic distribution to detect directional anisotropy
brief_reason: The abstract tests isotropy of points (FRBs) on the sky using the two-point angular correlation function and a sigma-map angular power spectrum whose low-multipole components are checked for statistically significant directional deviation from the isotropic expectation.
